name: blackgum-remotion
description: Animaciones de vídeo para Black Gum – generadas con Remotion

scripts.render: npx remotion render src/index.ts DiaryLoader out/diary-loader.mp4
scripts.render:gif: npx remotion render src/index.ts DiaryLoader out/diary-loader.gif --image-format png
scripts.render:webm: npx remotion render src/index.ts DiaryLoader out/diary-loader.webm --codec vp8
